name: spoken personal-attribute claim in the voiceover blocks the gate
description: A video whose copy/image is clean but whose VOICEOVER says a banned personal-attribute claim ('Are you embarrassed by your smile?') MUST FAIL meta.spoken_personal_attributes (block). The audio surface is the one the image/copy checks never see; the spoken-claim rule scans the script_outline's hook + segments + outro via creative.voiceover_text.

creative.voiceover_text:
Are you embarrassed by your smile?
We can fix that fast.
Book a visit today.
